array.name: helper_content_desc_hdmi
array.item: Ka taea e Ready For te hono atu ki te TV, te aroturuki, te PC ranei mo te petipeti, whakangahau, whakahaere waea mamao, me etahi atu.
Ka taea e koe te whakawhiti ki tētahi wheako rerekē mā te patopato i te miru māngi i tō waea.
Tūhonoa he papapātuhi me te kiore mō te wheako tino pai. Mēnā kāore i a koe he kiore, ka huri tō mata waea hei pūpatopā.

Kāore pea ētahi taupānga e mahi pai i te aratau papamahi, ā, kāore pea ētahi e tuku i a koe kia purei ihirangi i tētahi whakaatu tuarua. Me whakarite hoki koe i tō kaupane, i te TV mo te wheako tirohanga tino pai.

array.name: helper_content_title_hdmi
array.item: Whakawhiti ana i ngā aratau whakaatu
